body_txt: The Herald is a person, message, or crystallizing incident that sets the Hero/Protagonist on the path of adventure. They bring the Call to Adventure . If a story's setup is similar to this:  then "X" is the Herald. Oh, and you'd better hope "X" isn't also the Big Bad , cause that tends to get messy . The Herald can be non-human (a newspaper or news report, for examples), but a more memorable force has more impact. Common sub-tropes include: The Herald may have to bribe and /or enforce the call. Not to be confused with Heralds on TV Tropes .
